title: BetterUp - Digital Coaching and Mental Wellness Platform
problem: Employers struggle to support employee mental health and professional development. Traditional coaching is expensive and not scalable.
solution: Digital platform connecting employees with professional coaches for mental wellness, career development, and leadership coaching.
technology: Video coaching platform, AI matching, content library
regulatory_notes: Coaching platform, not clinical therapy. Different regulatory path.
varden_fit: Low — employer wellness/coaching, not clinical healthcare. Different market segment.
notes: Enterprise coaching market. Adjacent to clinical mental health.
